description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single stage called build. Add a job named build that runs in the build stage for all branches except master, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". Add another job named build-master that runs in the build stage only on the master branch, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
